query_normalized: the role of cognitive dissonance in justifying unethical ai use psychology
rationale: The paper focuses on technical explainability (XAI) methodologies in healthcare to build trust, which is a distinct construct from the psychological mechanism of "cognitive dissonance" used to justify unethical behavior.
